notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved to another location.

items.title: Accordion
items.description: Expandable and collapsible content panels.

items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Indicates the location within the site through a sequence of links.

items.title: Button
items.description: Interactive buttons for user actions.

items.title: Callout
items.description: Callout component to show additional content.

items.title: Card
items.description: Flexible container with header, content, and footer.

items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Hide or show sections of content dynamically.

items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal windows for user notifications and interactions.

items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Menu that expands to reveal additional options.

items.title: Input
items.description: A text input field with label, error handling, icon slots, and size variants.

items.title: Label
items.description: A label component with required indicator, optional text, and description support.

items.title: Popover
items.description: A floating panel with interactive content, triggered by click.

items.title: Progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.title: Separator
items.description: A visual divider for separating content with optional label.

items.title: Sheet
items.description: Sheet component to show additional content.

items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A placeholder loading component with pulse animation.

items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.title: Table
items.description: A table component to display tabular data.

items.title: Tabs
items.description: Switch between different content panels easily.

items.title: Toast
items.description: A notification system with stackable toasts, variants, and auto-dismiss.

items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays contextual information associated with an element when it receives keyboard focus or when the user hovers over it with the mouse.
